cards.title: New hotel
cards.body: Start a hotel setup path for supply, Booking Engine, and demand routes.

cards.title: New Partner
cards.body: Start a Partner path for bookable recommendations and attribution.

cards.title: Support
cards.body: Get help with account access or an active Wink workflow.

items.question: Who should use Login?
items.answer: Login is for existing Wink users with an active workspace or account invitation.

items.question: What if I do not have an account?
items.answer: Use Sign up if you know your role, or Request a demo if you need to discuss the use case first.

items.question: Where do I get account help?
items.answer: Use the contact support route if your workspace, invitation, or account access needs attention.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
